title: Portable Handheld Fan, 4200mAh USB Fan with LED Display, 3-in-1 Handheld/Neck/Desktop Fan, 90° Adjustable Foldable, for Summer, Office, Bedroom, Travel, Gifts for Adult & Kid (Dark Blue)

description: Product Description Why Choose Refluxe Mini Handheld Fan? This Refluxe mini handheld fan features five adjustable speeds, from a gentle breeze to a powerful gust, perfect for staying cool in summer, after workouts, or on outdoor trips. Its compact design makes it easy to carry—ideal for the office, travel, or home. This hand fan is a great cooling companion for hot days with quiet operation, long battery life, and a USB Type-C charging port. Smart LED Display The clear LED display on the USB hand held fans shows the current battery level and fan wind speed at a glance, allowing you to easily monitor its status and ensure the fan is always ready when needed. Removable Fan Cover & Scent Pad The detachable mini fan cover makes cleaning effortless—just twist it counterclockwise to remove dust and keep the fan running longer. Add your favorite essential oil or perfume to the scent pad for a refreshing, fragrant breeze. 90° Foldable This rechargeable hand held fan features a 90° adjustable foldable, allowing you to easily fold and adjust the airflow direction to meet various needs. Compact & Portable Net Weighing just 179g(0.39 lb), this hand fan rechargeable is lightweight and easy to carry, making it perfect for travel, outdoor activities, or daily use. Stay cool anytime, anywhere with your portable fan. Whisper-Quiet Performance This handheld fan delivers powerful airflow with whisper-quiet operation. Ensuring the Refluxe hand fan folding won't disturb your work, relaxation, or sleep. Strong Airflow & 5 Adjustable Speeds The Refluxe hand held fans offers 5 speed settings to suit your needs, from a gentle breeze to a powerful airflow. Whether you're cooling down after a workout, working in the office, or enjoying outdoor activities in the summer, this neck fan provides a refreshing experience anytime, anywhere. Type-C Charging & Long Battery Life With fast Type-C charging, the portable fan handheld offers 5.5 to 12 hours of battery life (depending on wind speed). The hand held fans rechargeable provide reliable, long-lasting cooling, making it the perfect companion for hot summer days.
